params.name: search
params.description: Lucene-style search expression scoped to the dataset's fields.

params.name: sort
params.description: Field to sort by, with optional direction (e.g. `receivedate:desc`).

params.name: count
params.description: Field to count occurrences against (returns aggregated terms).

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of records to return (max 1000).

params.name: skip
params.description: Number of records to skip for pagination (max 25,000).
